---
title: "Presentations"
---

```{=html}
<style>
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@700;900&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap');

  .pres-hero {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0038A8 0%, #001f6b 60%, #000d3a 100%);
    border-radius: 20px;
    padding: 3.5rem 3rem 3rem;
    margin: 1.5rem 0 2.5rem;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .pres-hero::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: -60px; right: -60px;
    width: 280px; height: 280px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
  }
  .pres-hero::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: -80px; left: 30px;
    width: 200px; height: 200px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
  }
  .pres-hero-tag {
    display: inline-block;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
    color: #a8c4ff;
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 0.35rem 0.9rem;
    border-radius: 100px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
    margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
  }
  .pres-hero h2 {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif;
    font-size: 2.4rem;
    font-weight: 900;
    color: #ffffff;
    margin: 0 0 0.75rem;
    line-height: 1.15;
  }
  .pres-hero-sub {
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 1rem;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65);
    font-weight: 300;
    margin-bottom: 2.2rem;
    line-height: 1.6;
    max-width: 480px;
  }
  .pres-meta-row {
    display: flex;
    gap: 1.5rem;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
  }
  .pres-meta-chip {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.45rem;
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
  }
  .pres-btn-row {
    display: flex;
    gap: 1rem;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
  .pres-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.6rem;
    background: #ffffff;
    color: #0038A8;
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    padding: 0.75rem 1.6rem;
    border-radius: 100px;
    text-decoration: none;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
  }
  .pres-cta:hover {
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
    text-decoration: none;
    color: #0038A8;
  }
  .pres-cta-ghost {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.6rem;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    color: #ffffff;
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    padding: 0.75rem 1.6rem;
    border-radius: 100px;
    text-decoration: none;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
  }
  .pres-cta-ghost:hover {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.18);
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    text-decoration: none;
    color: #ffffff;
  }
  .pres-details-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(160px, 1fr));
    gap: 1rem;
    margin: 2rem 0;
  }
  .pres-detail-card {
    background: #f7f8fc;
    border: 1px solid #e4e8f5;
    border-radius: 14px;
    padding: 1.2rem 1.3rem;
  }
  .pres-detail-label {
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #7a85a3;
    margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
  }
  .pres-detail-value {
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    color: #1a2040;
  }
  .pres-section-label {
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #7a85a3;
    margin: 2.5rem 0 1rem;
  }
  .pres-topic-list {
    list-style: none;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.6rem;
  }
  .pres-topic-list li {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.7rem;
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    color: #2a3050;
  }
  .pres-bullet {
    width: 7px;
    height: 7px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: #0038A8;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .pres-divider {
    border: none;
    border-top: 1px solid #e4e8f5;
    margin: 2rem 0;
  }
  .pres-github-bar {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 1rem;
    background: #f7f8fc;
    border: 1px solid #e4e8f5;
    border-radius: 14px;
    padding: 1.1rem 1.4rem;
    margin-top: 1.5rem;
    text-decoration: none;
  }
  .pres-github-bar:hover {
    background: #eef0f9;
    text-decoration: none;
  }
  .pres-github-icon {
    width: 36px;
    height: 36px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .pres-github-text-main {
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    color: #1a2040;
  }
  .pres-github-text-sub {
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    color: #7a85a3;
    margin-top: 0.1rem;
  }
  .pres-github-arrow {
    margin-left: auto;
    color: #7a85a3;
    font-size: 1.1rem;
  }
</style>

<div class="pres-hero">
  <div class="pres-hero-tag">Final Project Presentation</div>
  <h2>Final Project Presentation</h2>
  <p class="pres-hero-sub">
    A comprehensive final project presentation by Geovanni Flores, published on RPubs.
  </p>
  <div class="pres-meta-row">
    <span class="pres-meta-chip">🕐 May 2026</span>
    <span class="pres-meta-chip">👥 Geovanni Flores</span>
    <span class="pres-meta-chip">📄 RPubs · R Markdown</span>
  </div>
  <div class="pres-btn-row">
    <a class="pres-cta" href="https://rpubs.com/GeovanniF03/1428948" target="_blank">
      View Presentation →
    </a>
    <a class="pres-cta-ghost" href="https://github.com/GeoFlores03/Group-Project-1" target="_blank">
      GitHub Repo →
    </a>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="pres-details-grid">
  <div class="pres-detail-card">
    <div class="pres-detail-label">Type</div>
    <div class="pres-detail-value">Final Presentation</div>
  </div>
  <div class="pres-detail-card">
    <div class="pres-detail-label">Tool</div>
    <div class="pres-detail-value">R Markdown</div>
  </div>
  <div class="pres-detail-card">
    <div class="pres-detail-label">Platform</div>
    <div class="pres-detail-value">RPubs</div>
  </div>
  <div class="pres-detail-card">
    <div class="pres-detail-label">Status</div>
    <div class="pres-detail-value">Published</div>
  </div>
</div>

<hr class="pres-divider">

<p class="pres-section-label">What's Covered</p>
<ul class="pres-topic-list">
  <li><span class="pres-bullet"></span>Overview of academic characteristics within the dataset</li>
  <li><span class="pres-bullet"></span>Group research objectives and proposed methodology</li>
  <li><span class="pres-bullet"></span>Preliminary findings and data exploration</li>
  <li><span class="pres-bullet"></span>Next steps and project roadmap</li>
</ul>

<a class="pres-github-bar" href="https://github.com/GeoFlores03/Group-Project-1" target="_blank">
  <svg class="pres-github-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="#1a2040" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <path d="M12 0C5.37 0 0 5.37 0 12c0 5.31 3.435 9.795 8.205 11.385.6.105.825-.255.825-.57 0-.285-.015-1.23-.015-2.235-3.015.555-3.795-.735-4.035-1.41-.135-.345-.72-1.41-1.23-1.695-.42-.225-1.02-.78-.015-.795.945-.015 1.62.87 1.845 1.23 1.08 1.815 2.805 1.305 3.495.99.105-.78.42-1.305.765-1.605-2.67-.3-5.46-1.335-5.46-5.925 0-1.305.465-2.385 1.23-3.225-.12-.3-.54-1.53.12-3.18 0 0 1.005-.315 3.3 1.23.96-.27 1.98-.405 3-.405s2.04.135 3 .405c2.295-1.56 3.3-1.23 3.3-1.23.66 1.65.24 2.88.12 3.18.765.84 1.23 1.905 1.23 3.225 0 4.605-2.805 5.625-5.475 5.925.435.375.81 1.095.81 2.22 0 1.605-.015 2.895-.015 3.3 0 .315.225.69.825.57A12.02 12.02 0 0 0 24 12c0-6.63-5.37-12-12-12z"/>
  </svg>
  <div>
    <div class="pres-github-text-main">GeoFlores03 / Group-Project-1</div>
    <div class="pres-github-text-sub">View source code, data, and files on GitHub</div>
  </div>
  <span class="pres-github-arrow">→</span>
</a>
```
